metadata.description: Swiss Cheese model tooling for agentic coding — stack imperfect defense layers (deterministic pre-LLM guards, scripted gates, a deterministic review-lens floor, multi-lens agent review, docs/ADR discipline, human review) so their holes never align.

plugins.name: swiss-cheese
plugins.description: Layered defense (Swiss Cheese model) for agentic coding: native skills, deterministic stdlib-only guards (injection/secrets+redaction/policy/slopsquat) enforced by commit hooks, an unremovable review-lens floor with independent read-only lens subagents, a fail-closed audit log, and per-lens project memory.
